creator: jjreynold@home.com
text:
Attached is a tiny patch to the flexbackup port. My e-mail address has
changed from jreynold@primenet.com to jjreynold@home.com. I'm hoping
that this can get committed before 3.4 "goes golden." Thank you!

How-To-Repeat: 
  cd /usr/ports/sysutils
  patch < patchfile
